title: Spiders sensing you
description: Spiders have Spider Sense to find you :)
body:
upon spawn, Spiders will set a player within a cube the size of 500 blocks from them as their target. (only if the player is in survival or adventure mode)

made this mod so i can use it along side [Nyfs Spiders
](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyfs-spiders), i also made another mod to use alongside these two, in which [Spiders Create Webs](https://modrinth.com/mod/spiders-make-webs).


and then to counter those Webs i made: [Spider Webs kinda burn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spider-webs-countered-by-fire)

my modrinth profile [auiki](https://modrinth.com/user/auikiouy)

If you have suggestions, questions or something of the like, my discord is auiki

(made with Mcreator)
